title: Menu — Cafe Portrait | Vancouver
heroSubtitle: Fresh, locally sourced, and crafted with love
chefsNote: All our dishes are prepared fresh to order. We're happy to accommodate dietary restrictions — just let your server know. Brunch is served all day, and our After 4 menu is available from 4:00 PM onwards.
